name: @acds/db-tools
description: Database migrations and seed utilities for bootstrapping ACDS runtime state.

scripts.migrate: bash -lc 'for f in migrations/*.sql; do psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f "$f"; done'
scripts.seed: pnpm run seed:model-profiles && pnpm run seed:tactic-profiles && pnpm run seed:policies
